analysis_description: Round-3 tape days 0-2: Black-Scholes implied vol (brentq, r=0) from mids; moneyness m = log(K/S)/sqrt(T) with T = dte_effective/365 where dte_effective = (8-csv_day) - floor(timestamp/100)/10000 (csv_day 0->8d, 1->7d, 2->6d at open; intraday decay aligned with round3work/plotting/original_method/combined_analysis/plot_iv_smile_round3 and round3description.txt). WLS quadratic sigma(m) with weights max(vega,1e-6) at fitted IV. Top-of-book spread (ask1-bid1) on VEV subsampled timestamps: mean ~5.64, median 2. See smile_wls_detail.json for coefficients.
used_to_decide: Fair voucher = BS call at sigma_fit(m) from pooled WLS coeffs; trade when edge exceeds fraction of spread and vega above floor; hydrogel MM with tight spread when book valid.

analysis_description: Parameter grid on execution and gates (trader v0-v3): passive vs touch-cross; edge_frac in {0.18,0.22,0.26}; min_vega in {0.03,0.04,0.045}; min spread 2; prior-only warmup 120 steps. Backtester worse-match: passive bids below best ask rarely fill; touch-cross needed for VEV PnL.
used_to_decide: Chose v3: pooled prior early + spread>=2 + edge_frac 0.26 + touch-cross; raised Round-3 days 0-2 aggregate PnL vs v2 while keeping same BS-at-fitted-IV concept.

analysis_description: Edge quality analysis on Round-3 tapes (days 0-2) under fixed pooled smile coefficients: for each timestamp/strike, computed fair via BS(sigma(m)) and features edge_per_spread=|mid-fair|/spread and edge_per_vega=|mid-fair|/vega, using T=dte_effective/365 with dte_effective=(8-csv_day)-floor(ts/100)/10000. Output saved in iv_edge_bucket_analysis_iter4.json.
used_to_decide: Observed strongest edge_per_spread concentration in VEV_5300/5400/5200 and stable activity in 5000-5400 complex; implemented v4/v5 as strike-selective touch-crossing with vega-normalized edge gate while keeping same WLS quadratic smile fair model.

analysis_description: IV vs extract: on ROUND_3 days 0-2, subsample step-to-step (VEV_5200), IV from bisection on mid, IV_model from pooled WLS sigma(m), dS = change in VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT mid. Saved iv_extract_comovement_iter6.json (corr(dS, IV) ~ -0.11; IV error vs model similar in high- vs low-move quartiles, so we tested extract-move edge scaling in v6; backtest PnL fell vs v5). Ablation: v7 = smooth prior-to-online WLS blend only (no EMA gating) also trailed v5, so the hard step-120 prior switch in v5 is preferred for this data.
used_to_decide: Keep production candidate trader_v5.py; v6 and v7 kept as ablations. Future work: optional BS theta in fair sensitivity tests; no thesis change.

analysis_description: Greek bucket scan on ROUND_3 tapes (days 0-2, every 25th timestamp): Black-Scholes call |theta| and gamma at sigma from pooled WLS quadratic in m, T=dte_effective/365. Saved greek_buckets_iter8.json — near-ATM strikes (5000-5400) show largest median |theta| and gamma vs wings. Used to justify scaling execution gates by |theta| in trader_v8.
used_to_decide: trader_v8.py: multiply edge_frac threshold and edge/vega minimum by theta_edge_multiplier(|theta|) (~1.0-1.2), keeping v5 logic otherwise. Backtest total 55659 vs v5 49178 on same regime; new best line for this branch.

analysis_description: Parameter sweep on v8 theta gating: _THETA_EDGE_MULT in {0.12, 0.15} with _THETA_REF=1200. v9 at 0.15 edge multiplier edges v8; logged in results.json only (same greek_buckets_iter8 analysis).
used_to_decide: Prefer trader_v9.py for PnL on this tape; v8 kept as mid-sweep point.

analysis_description: Book spread vs smile mispricing: on ROUND_3 days 0-2, per timestamp and strike, compute top-of-book spread and |mid - BS_fair|/vega (fair from pooled WLS sigma(m), T from dte_effective/365). Pearson ~0.68 between spread and edge/vega (n~10000 subsampled), median spread 2, p75~6. Output spread_vegaedge_corr_iter10.json.
used_to_decide: v10: multiply the v9 |theta| gate by an extra 1+0.08*clip((spr-2)/6) (capped) so we are stricter on wide books; v11 sweeps _THETA_REF to 1000; v10 best at 57336 vs v9 57068 on this backtest.
